title: Improve status color consistency across multiple boards through clearer names/RBG codes
excerpt: I run multiple, separate teams within one overarching process. Each team has a separate board but all are connected via automations through a specific status column. However, some teams have used different colors within …

posts.author: Ben_R (Ben Rabinovich)
posts.cookedHtml:
I run multiple, separate teams within one overarching process. Each team has a separate board but all are connected via automations through a specific status column. However, some teams have used different colors within the connected/automation-facing status column - meaning the automation goes a bit haywire since color doesn’t align. Currently, it’s almost impossible to direct teams on which colors to use since any in-use status colors’ names don’t appear and any not-in-use color selections vary from board to board.

It would be incredibly helpful if different boards could sync up status colors simultaneously either through ability to search for specific colors by name or apply RBG codes. That way it ensures flexibility and room for pivot when colors should change.
